testcase.name: difference

error.message: Error: To recode NAs you need to use the 'missing' argument ('test-math_bug-ds.recodeValues.R:83:13')

testcase.error: Error: To recode NAs you need to use the 'missing' argument Backtrace: x 1. \-global .test.differences.in.sets(...) at test-math_bug-ds.recodeValues.R:83:13 2. \-global .apply.changes.server(...) 3. \-dsBaseClient::ds.recodeValues(...)

testcase.name: changes_in_distribution
testcase.failure: Expected `errors[ds.test_env$MEAN]` to equal 0. Differences: Lengths differ: 0 is not 1 Backtrace: x 1. \-global .test.dispersions.stats.same.distribution(seed, c(6), seed, c(6)) at test-math_bug-ds.rPois.R:44:3 2. \-testthat::expect_equal(errors[ds.test_env$MEAN], 0, tolerance = ds.test_env$tolerance)

testcase.name: mean_variance
testcase.failure: Expected `dist.stats[5]` to equal `max.value`. Differences: 1/1 mismatches [1] NA - 2 == NA Backtrace: x 1. \-global .test.range.values(1, 2, "uniform_1", seed) at test-math_bug-ds.rUnif.R:22:3 2. \-testthat::expect_equal(dist.stats[5], max.value, tolerance = 10^2)

testcase.name: mean_variance
testcase.failure: Expected `dist.stats[4]` to equal `min.value`. Differences: 1/1 mismatches [1] NA - 1 == NA Backtrace: x 1. \-global .test.range.values(1, 2, "uniform_1", seed) at test-math_bug-ds.rUnif.R:22:3 2. \-testthat::expect_equal(dist.stats[4], min.value, tolerance = 10^2)

testcase.name: mean_variance
testcase.failure: Expected `dist.stats[5]` to equal `max.value`. Differences: 1/1 mismatches [1] NA - 2 == NA Backtrace: x 1. \-global .test.range.values(-1, 2, "uniform_2", seed) at test-math_bug-ds.rUnif.R:23:3 2. \-testthat::expect_equal(dist.stats[5], max.value, tolerance = 10^2)

testcase.name: mean_variance
testcase.failure: Expected `dist.stats[4]` to equal `min.value`. Differences: 1/1 mismatches [1] NA - -1 == NA Backtrace: x 1. \-global .test.range.values(-1, 2, "uniform_2", seed) at test-math_bug-ds.rUnif.R:23:3 2. \-testthat::expect_equal(dist.stats[4], min.value, tolerance = 10^2)

testcase.name: mean_variance
testcase.failure: Expected `dist.stats[5]` to equal `max.value`. Differences: 1/1 mismatches [1] NA - -100 == NA Backtrace: x 1. \-global .test.range.values(-200, -100, "uniform_3", seed) at test-math_bug-ds.rUnif.R:24:3 2. \-testthat::expect_equal(dist.stats[5], max.value, tolerance = 10^2)

testcase.name: mean_variance
testcase.failure: Expected `dist.stats[4]` to equal `min.value`. Differences: 1/1 mismatches [1] NA - -200 == NA Backtrace: x 1. \-global .test.range.values(-200, -100, "uniform_3", seed) at test-math_bug-ds.rUnif.R:24:3 2. \-testthat::expect_equal(dist.stats[4], min.value, tolerance = 10^2)
